title: Zillow Group Reports Third-Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Zillow Group Q3 2024 Financial Results Summary. Key Financial Metrics: Revenue Performance: Total Q3 revenue: $581 million, up 17% YoY. Exceeded company outlook by $28 million. Nine-month revenue: $1.682 billion, up 14% YoY. Revenue Breakdown (Q3 2024): Residential: $405 million (+12% YoY). Rentals: $123 million (+24% YoY). Mortgages: $39 million (+63% YoY). Other: $14 million (+27% YoY). Profitability & Margins: Net loss: $20 million (3% of revenue). Adjusted EBITDA: $127 million (22% of revenue). Gross profit margin: 76%. Cash and investments: $2.2 billion. Operational Highlights: CEO Jeremy Wacksman stated: "Zillow had another strong quarter, with 17% total revenue growth year over year." Traffic Metrics: Monthly unique users: 233 million (+1% YoY). Total visits: 2.4 billion (+3% YoY). Notable Achievement: Mortgage origination volume surged 80% to $812 million, driving the 63% revenue increase in that segment.
